title: cyperus sciaphilus
intro: Cyperus sciaphilus, also known as the 'Night-flowering flat sedge', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus sciaphilus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
